name: Growatt Solar Inverter Monitoring and Smart Energy API
what_it_does: Growatt solar inverter monitoring and smart energy REST API for solar installers, energy aggregators, and smart home developers to access real-time solar production data, energy storage status, and grid interaction metrics from Growatt inverters via Growatt's ShineServer cloud platform — enabling automated monitoring of global Growatt inverter deployments, energy yield tracking, battery storage management, and EV charger integration through Growatt's cloud-connected solar monitoring infrastructure. Enables AI agents to manage plant monitoring for Growatt solar system performance automation, handle device status for inverter health monitoring automation, access energy yield for solar production analytics automation, retrieve battery data for energy storage management automation, manage EV charger for Growatt AC charger integration automation, handle alarm management for fault detection automation, access historical data for long-term performance analysis automation, retrieve weather data for irradiance-adjusted performance automation, manage plant list for multi-site solar portfolio monitoring automation, and integrate Growatt with solar monitoring dashboards, energy management systems, and portfolio management platforms for renewable energy automation.
use_cases: Monitoring Growatt solar inverter performance and energy production across residential and commercial installations automation agents
Managing Growatt battery storage systems for energy storage optimization and time-of-use management automation agents
Aggregating multi-site Growatt solar portfolio data for installer and asset management platform automation agents
Integrating Growatt EV charger data with smart home energy management for vehicle charging optimization automation agents
not_for: Non-Growatt hardware (API only works with Growatt inverters and devices registered in ShineServer)
Real-time millisecond-resolution monitoring (Growatt API provides 5-15 minute resolution data)
Grid utility-grade metering (Growatt is PV monitoring, not revenue-grade utility metering)
best_when: A solar installer, energy aggregator, or smart home developer wanting AI agents to monitor Growatt inverter deployments, access energy production data, and manage battery storage through Growatt's ShineServer cloud platform.
avoid_when: GROWATT SHINESERVER REGISTRATION REQUIRED: Growatt API requires devices registered in ShineServer and API access application; automated open API access assumption creates authentication_failed for unregistered systems; automated must register devices in ShineServer and apply for API access. DATA RESOLUTION LIMITATION: Growatt API typically provides 5-15 minute interval data, not second-by-second; automated real-time high-resolution data assumption creates coarser than expected resolution; automated must design monitoring around 5-15 minute data resolution. CHINESE API DOCUMENTATION: Growatt API documentation is primarily in Chinese; automated English-only documentation assumption creates integration complexity; automated developers should expect Chinese-language primary documentation with partial English translation. API VERSION INCONSISTENCY: Growatt has multiple API versions (OSS, OpenAPI) with different capabilities; automated single unified API assumption creates endpoint confusion; automated must identify correct API version for specific use case.

auth.notes: Growatt uses API key for ShineServer API authentication. REST API with JSON. Shenzhen, China HQ. Founded 2010. Products: Residential inverters, commercial inverters, storage systems (GBLI, SPA), EV chargers, ShineServer cloud monitoring, ShineBus data logger. SDKs: None public. Enterprise API access requires application. 7M+ inverters globally. Global install base (China, Europe, Australia, Americas). Competes with Sungrow and GoodWe for Chinese solar inverter market.

pricing.free_tier_limits: ShineServer free for registered users; API access may require enterprise application
pricing.paid_tiers: API access custom pricing for commercial aggregators; enterprise monitoring packages
pricing.notes: Shenzhen CN. ShineServer cloud. API access by application. 7M+ global inverters. Chinese solar leader.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; data retrieval APIs throttled; 5-15 minute data granularity

known_agent_gotchas: CHINESE DOCUMENTATION PRIMARY: Growatt ShineServer API documentation is primarily in Chinese; automated English-comprehensive documentation assumption creates significant integration barrier; automated developers must use Chinese documentation with translation tools

MULTIPLE API VERSIONS CO-EXIST: Growatt has OSS API, OpenAPI, and older API versions with different endpoints and capabilities; automated single API version assumption creates confusion; automated must identify correct Growatt API version (OSS is for third-party aggregators)

DEVICE MUST BE REGISTERED IN SHINESERVER: All Growatt devices must be registered in ShineServer before API access; automated API-without-registration assumption creates device_not_found; automated must ensure all devices registered with correct ShineServer account
TOKEN REFRESH REQUIRED: Growatt API tokens expire and require refresh; automated permanent token assumption creates authentication_expired; automated must implement token refresh logic

DATA IS 5-15 MINUTE INTERVALS: Growatt historical data is typically in 5-15 minute intervals; automated second-resolution assumption creates coarser data than expected; automated must design analytics around available data granularity
agent_readiness.security_notes: Chinese solar inverter monitoring. GDPR, Chinese data law. API key. China/Global. Solar production and device data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Chinese solar inverter. GDPR, Chinese data law. API key. China/Global. Solar and device data.
